patchNotes.headline: Mac recovery hardening
patchNotes.summary: v1.0.72 restores the qualified Mac voice lane while hardening guild creation, /guildchat stability, notifications, and session recovery on the production client bundle.

sections.title: Recovery
items: Mac voice, mic test, and relaunch behavior are recovered on the currently qualified media path instead of the previously broken local state.
Guild creation and /guildchat onboarding no longer crash the renderer when guild state mounts after the shell is already visible.
Fully quit and relaunch /guild after updating so the refreshed voice and runtime recovery paths start cleanly.

sections.title: Stability
items: DM notifications, hidden-app OS notifications, universal /guildchat access, and session restore stay on the qualified stabilization bundle.
Fresh QR signer sessions continue to work, while longer-idle QR reconnect remains a lower-priority follow-up lane outside this Mac recovery push.

patchNotes.headline: Windows startup recovery
patchNotes.summary: v1.0.71 fixes the Windows startup packaging gap from 1.0.70 while keeping the same refreshed /guildchat, notifications, and current working voice lane.

sections.title: Windows
items: The missing packaged runtime config files are restored so the Windows main process can boot again after update.
This keeps the refreshed /guildchat mentions, DM notifications, OS notifications, and universal /guildchat access from the stabilization pass.
Fully quit and relaunch /guild after updating so the corrected Windows bundle starts cleanly.

sections.title: Stability
items: Voice stays on the same working production media path rather than introducing a new media stack change.
This Windows recovery release is packaging-focused and does not change the live server-side guild chat rules.
